name: warpish-terminal
description: Local-only Chrome web terminal with a real macOS PTY, Warp-inspired UI.

scripts.check: npm run lint && node --check server.js && node --check storage.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/paste-safety.js && node --check public/terminal-key-data.js && node --check public/terminal-input.js && node --check public/input-composer.js && node --check public/rtl-terminal-renderer.js && node --check scripts/smoke.js && node --check scripts/browser-regressions.js && node --check scripts/ui-stability-agent.js && node --check scripts/terminal-key-data.test.js && node --check scripts/terminal-input.test.js && node --check scripts/input-composer.test.js && node --check scripts/rtl-terminal-renderer.test.js && node --check scripts/regression-contracts.test.js && node scripts/paste-safety.test.js && node scripts/terminal-key-data.test.js && node scripts/terminal-input.test.js && node scripts/input-composer.test.js && node scripts/rtl-terminal-renderer.test.js && node scripts/regression-contracts.test.js && node scripts/hermes-choice-policy.test.js && node scripts/storage.test.js && python3 -m py_compile scripts/pty-worker.py scripts/record-shell-event.py && zsh -n scripts/warpish-shell-integration.zsh && bash -n start.sh stop.sh scripts/install-launch-agent.sh scripts/uninstall-launch-agent.sh && git diff --check
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke && npm run regression
